moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The final round of the 154th Open Championship is underway today at Royal Birkdale, with golf's biggest prize up for grabs.

angles.name: Final Day Drama
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The final day of The Open Championship from Royal Birkdale. Who will lift the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Golfing Glory
angles.copy: History in the making today at Royal Birkdale. The 154th Open Champion will be crowned. Catch the drama as it unfolds!

moments.title: Love Island UK Heating Up
moments.blurb: Love Island UK is in full swing, with the drama intensifying as islanders navigate new couplings, dumpings, and bombshell arrivals. The series typically runs through July and August, making this a peak week for action.

angles.name: Daily Dose of Drama
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's coupling up and who's heading home tonight? You won't want to miss it.

angles.name: Bombshell Alert
angles.copy: It's getting spicy in the villa! Are we due for another bombshell to shake things up on Love Island? Tune in tonight!

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart was announced on Friday, with [Artist Name] holding strong at Number 1 for another week, fending off fierce competition from [Another Artist].

angles.name: Chart Topper Reign
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! [Artist Name] holds onto the UK Number 1 spot. Who did they beat to stay on top?

angles.name: New Music Vibes
angles.copy: Did your favourite track make it into the Top 40 this week? The Official Singles Chart is in, packed with the biggest hits!

moments.title: School's Out for Summer!
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are now officially on summer holidays, marking the start of weeks of fun for families and kids.

angles.name: Holiday Mode On
angles.copy: It's official! School's out for summer across much of the UK. Who's already planning their great escape?

angles.name: Summer Fun Begins
angles.copy: No more school runs for a while! The summer holidays are here. What are your plans for soaking up the sun?

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Brian May! His riffs have rocked generations. What's your favourite Queen track?

angles.name: Queen's Maestro
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the one and only Brian May! 79 years young and still a rock 'n' roll legend. Play us out, Brian!

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: The legendary Mexican-American guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 20th.

angles.name: Smooth Guitar
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday tomorrow to the incredible Carlos Santana! His guitar work is instantly recognisable. Which Santana track is your go-to?

angles.name: Rock & Latin Fusion
angles.copy: Celebrating Carlos Santana's 79th birthday tomorrow! A true pioneer of rock and Latin fusion. Get ready to feel the rhythm!

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drummer, Don Henley, will be 79 years old on July 21st.

angles.name: Eagles Drummer's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley of The Eagles on July 21st! An absolute rock legend.

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, Don Henley's voice is iconic. Happy 79th for Tuesday!

moments.title: David Essex turns 79
moments.blurb: British singer and actor David Essex celebrates his 79th birthday on July 23rd.

angles.name: Rock On Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the 'Rock On' legend, David Essex, this Thursday! What's your favourite track from him?

angles.name: British Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 79th to British singing and acting icon, David Essex, on July 23rd!

moments.title: Alison Krauss turns 55
moments.blurb: American bluegrass-country singer and fiddler Alison Krauss will celebrate her 55th birthday on July 23rd.

angles.name: Bluegrass Queen
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the incredible Alison Krauss on July 23rd! Her voice is pure magic. ✨

angles.name: Grammy Winner
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 55th birthday to the multi-Grammy-winning Alison Krauss this Thursday! What's your favourite song?

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash, celebrates his 61st birthday on July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the top-hatted guitar hero, Slash, this Thursday! Those riffs are legendary.

angles.name: Guns N' Roses Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a rockin' 61st to Guns N' Roses' very own Slash for July 23rd! What's your favourite GNR track?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday Bash
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo on Friday! Still lighting up stages and screens worldwide.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday this Friday! What's your favourite J.Lo hit?

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to Sir Mick Jagger on Sunday! The ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Wishing an incredible birthday to Mick Jagger this Sunday.

moments.title: Kate Bush turns 68
moments.blurb: Iconic British singer-songwriter Kate Bush will celebrate her 68th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Wuthering Heights Star
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the enigmatic and brilliant Kate Bush this Sunday! Which of her songs is your favourite?

angles.name: Musical Visionary
angles.copy: Wishing a magical 68th birthday to the incredible Kate Bush on July 26th! A true musical visionary.

moments.title: Maureen McGovern turns 77
moments.blurb: American singer and Broadway actress Maureen McGovern, known for 'The Morning After', celebrates her 77th birthday on July 27th.

angles.name: Morning After Star
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the lovely Maureen McGovern on July 27th! Her voice is timeless.

angles.name: Broadway & Film Voice
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 77th birthday to Maureen McGovern this Monday, the voice behind classic film themes and Broadway hits!

moments.title: Geddy Lee turns 73
moments.blurb: Rush frontman and bassist, Geddy Lee, will celebrate his 73rd birthday on July 27th.

angles.name: Rush Legend's Day
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the incredible Geddy Lee of Rush on July 27th! His basslines are legendary.

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a rockin' 73rd to Rush's iconic frontman, Geddy Lee, this Monday! What's your favourite Rush track?

moments.title: Cher Lloyd turns 33
moments.blurb: British singer Cher Lloyd, who rose to fame on The X Factor, celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 28th.

angles.name: X Factor Star
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to Cher Lloyd on Tuesday! From X Factor to chart success, she's had quite the journey.

angles.name: Swagger Jagger
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 33rd to Cher Lloyd for July 28th! Get ready to 'Swagger Jagger' in celebration!

moments.title: Martina McBride turns 60
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated American country music singer Martina McBride celebrates her 60th birthday on July 29th.

angles.name: Country Queen
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to the incredible Martina McBride on July 29th! A true voice of country music.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 60th to Martina McBride this Wednesday! Her powerful voice has graced the charts for decades.

moments.title: Neal Doughty turns 80
moments.blurb: Neal Doughty, founding member and keyboardist of REO Speedwagon, celebrates his 80th birthday on July 29th.

angles.name: REO Speedwagon Keyboardist
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to REO Speedwagon's Neal Doughty on July 29th! Still 'Ridin' the Storm Out' at 80!

angles.name: Rock & Roll Milestone
angles.copy: Wishing a huge 80th birthday to Neal Doughty this Wednesday! A founding member of a legendary rock band.

moments.title: Summer Escapes in Wales
moments.blurb: With summer holidays officially here, Wales is gearing up for a busy period with tourists flocking to its stunning beaches and scenic attractions.

angles.name: Best of Welsh Summer
angles.copy: Sun's out, schools are out! Where are you heading for your Welsh summer escape? Tag your favourite spot!

angles.name: Explore Local Gems
angles.copy: From hidden coves to mountain hikes, Wales has it all this summer. What local gems are you planning to explore?

moments.title: Devon Summer Adventures
moments.blurb: Devon is buzzing with activity as summer holidays begin, offering a wide array of attractions from coastal walks to local festivals.

angles.name: Devon's Delights
angles.copy: Summer is officially here in Devon! What's your go-to spot for a sunny day out in Exeter or beyond?

angles.name: Local Summer Fun
angles.copy: Schools are out, sun is shining! Get out and enjoy everything Devon has to offer this summer. Share your adventures!
